title: Double-bladed sword

The '''double-bladed sword''' was a melee weapon that had a grip in the center with two long blades emerging from either end. It was capable of dealing more damage than a regular [[Sword/Legends|sword]], but it was less precise. It predated the use of the modern [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]] and [[Vibrosword/Legends|vibrosword]]. Based in part on the [[Quarterstaff/Legends|quarterstaff]], a weapon of earlier origins, the double-bladed sword consisted of two blades set at opposite ends of an oversized hilt.

Somewhat ungainly because of the extra weight in the blades, the double-bladed sword required more strength and finesse to wield than conventional blades or quarterstaves, but it was remarkably effective in melee combat when used by an expert. The [[Wookiee warblade]], the [[Sith war sword]], and the [[Zhaboka/Legends|Zhaboka]] were types of double-bladed sword. A powered and modernized version of this weapon was called the [[vibro double-blade]], and a version later used in the [[Rise of the Empire era]] was called the [[double vibroblade]]. The principles of wielding this weapon were similar to the wielding of a [[Double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|double-bladed lightsaber]].
